lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我要去北京旅游，你觉得什么时候去最好？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yào qù Běijīng lǚyóu, nǐ juéde shénme shíhou qù zuì hǎo?
lines.english: I'm planning a trip to Beijing. When do you think is the best time to go?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 九月去北京旅游最好。
lines.pinyin: Jiǔyuè qù Běijīng lǚyóu zuì hǎo.
lines.english: September is the best time to visit Beijing.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 为什么？
lines.pinyin: Wèishénme?
lines.english: Why?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 九月的北京天气不冷也不热。
lines.pinyin: Jiǔyuè de Běijīng tiānqì bù lěng yě bú rè.
lines.english: The weather in Beijing in September is neither cold nor hot.

vocabulary.definition: to travel, to take a trip
to want to, would like to

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你很少生病，是不是喜欢运动？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ hěn shǎo shēngbìng, shì bu shì xǐhuan yùndòng?
lines.english: You seldom get sick. Do you like sports?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是啊，我每天早上都要出去跑步。
lines.pinyin: Shì a, wǒ měitiān zǎoshang dōu yào chūqù pǎobù.
lines.english: Yes, I go out for a run every morning.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你每天几点起床？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ měitiān jǐ diǎn qǐchuáng?
lines.english: What time do you get up every day?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我每天六点起床。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ měitiān liù diǎn qǐchuáng.
lines.english: I get up at six every day.

vocabulary.definition: to fall ill, to be sick
to get up, to get out of bed
to leave hospital, to be discharged
to have or take a rest

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这块手表是你的吗？
lines.pinyin: Zhè kuài shǒubiǎo shì nǐ de ma?
lines.english: Is this watch yours?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 不是我的。是我爸爸的。
lines.pinyin: Bú shì wǒ de. Shì wǒ bàba de.
lines.english: It's not mine. It's my father's.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 多少钱买的？
lines.pinyin: Duōshao qián mǎi de?
lines.english: How much did it cost?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 三千多块。
lines.pinyin: Sānqiān duō kuài.
lines.english: More than three thousand yuan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 生日快乐！这是送给你的！
lines.pinyin: Shēngrì kuàilè! Zhè shì sòng gěi nǐ de!
lines.english: Happy birthday! This is for you!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是什么？是一本书吗？
lines.pinyin: Shì shénme? Shì yì běn shū ma?
lines.english: What is it? Is it a book?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 对，这本书是我写的。
lines.pinyin: Duì, zhè běn shū shì wǒ xiě de.
lines.english: Yes, this book was written by me.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 太谢谢你了！
lines.pinyin: Tài xièxie nǐ le!
lines.english: Thank you so much!

vocabulary.definition: to receive, to take, to accept

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我们下午去看电影，好吗？
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen xiàwǔ qù kàn diànyǐng, hǎo ma?
lines.english: Shall we go to see a movie this afternoon?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 今天下午我没有时间，明天下午再去吧。
lines.pinyin: Jīntiān xiàwǔ wǒ méiyǒu shíjiān, míngtiān xiàwǔ zài qù ba.
lines.english: I don't have time this afternoon. Let's go tomorrow afternoon.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你想看什么电影？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng kàn shénme diànyǐng?
lines.english: What movie do you want to see?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 让我想想再告诉你。
lines.pinyin: Ràng wǒ xiǎngxiang zài gàosu nǐ.
lines.english: Let me think about it and tell you later.

vocabulary.definition: used to indicate a conclusion or resolution

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 不要看电视了，明天上午还有汉语课呢。
lines.pinyin: Búyào kàn diànshì le, míngtiān shàngwǔ háiyǒu Hànyǔ kè ne.
lines.english: Stop watching TV. You have Chinese class tomorrow morning.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 看电视对学汉语有帮助。
lines.pinyin: Kàn diànshì duì xué Hànyǔ yǒu bāngzhù.
lines.english: Watching TV helps with learning Chinese.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 明天的课你都准备好了吗？
lines.pinyin: Míngtiān de kè nǐ dōu zhǔnbèi hǎo le ma?
lines.english: Are you prepared for tomorrow's class?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 都准备好了。
lines.pinyin: Dōu zhǔnbèi hǎo le.
lines.english: I'm all prepared.

title: 王芳昨天和你一起唱歌的人是谁

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 王芳，昨天和你一起唱歌的人是谁？
lines.pinyin: Wáng Fāng, zuótiān hé nǐ yìqǐ chànggē de rén shì shéi?
lines.english: Wang Fang, who was the person singing with you yesterday?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 一个朋友。
lines.pinyin: Yí ge péngyou.
lines.english: A friend.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 什么朋友？是不是男朋友？
lines.pinyin: Shénme péngyou? Shì bu shì nánpéngyou?
lines.english: What kind of friend? Is it a boyfriend?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 不是不是，我同学介绍的，昨天第一次见。
lines.pinyin: Bú shì bú shì, wǒ tóngxué jièshào de, zuótiān dì yí cì jiàn.
lines.english: No, no. My classmate introduced us. It was the first time we met yesterday.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你每天早上几点起床？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ měitiān zǎoshang jǐ diǎn qǐchuáng?
lines.english: What time do you get up every morning?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 六点多。
lines.pinyin: Liù diǎn duō.
lines.english: A little past six.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你比我早起一个小时。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ bǐ wǒ zǎo qǐ yí ge xiǎoshí.
lines.english: You get up an hour earlier than me.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我睡得也早，我每天晚上十点就睡觉。早睡早起身体好。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ shuì de yě zǎo, wǒ měitiān wǎnshang shí diǎn jiù shuìjiào. Zǎo shuì zǎo qǐ shēntǐ hǎo.
lines.english: I also go to bed early. I go to sleep at ten every night. Early to bed and early to rise is good for health.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 门开着呢，请进。
lines.pinyin: Mén kāi zhe ne, qǐng jìn.
lines.english: The door is open, please come in.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 请问，张先生在吗？
lines.pinyin: Qǐngwèn, Zhāng xiānsheng zài ma?
lines.english: Excuse me, is Mr. Zhang here?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 他出去了。你下午再来吧。
lines.pinyin: Tā chūqù le. Nǐ xiàwǔ zài lái ba.
lines.english: He went out. Please come back in the afternoon.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好的，谢谢！
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie!
lines.english: Okay, thank you!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 听说你有女朋友了？我认识她吗？
lines.pinyin: Tīngshuō nǐ yǒu nǚpéngyou le? Wǒ rènshi tā ma?
lines.english: I heard you have a girlfriend now. Do I know her?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 就是我们班那个长着两个大眼睛，非常爱笑的女孩儿。
lines.pinyin: Jiùshì wǒmen bān nàge zhǎngzhe liǎng ge dà yǎnjing, fēicháng ài xiào de nǚháir.
lines.english: She is the girl in our class with big eyes and a smiling face.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 她不是有男朋友吗？
lines.pinyin: Tā búshì yǒu nánpéngyou ma?
lines.english: She's already got a boyfriend, hasn't she?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 那个已经是她的前男友了。
lines.pinyin: Nàge yǐjīng shì tā de qián nánpéngyou le.
lines.english: That's her ex now.

title: 请问，这儿离新京宾馆远吗

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 请问，这儿离新京宾馆远吗？
lines.pinyin: Qǐngwèn, zhèr lí Xīnjīng Bīnguǎn yuǎn ma?
lines.english: Excuse me, is Xinjing Hotel far from here?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 不远，走路二十分钟就到。
lines.pinyin: Bù yuǎn, zǒulù èrshí fēnzhōng jiù dào.
lines.english: Not far, about a 20 minutes' walk.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你能告诉我怎么走吗？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ néng gàosu wǒ zěnme zǒu ma?
lines.english: Could you tell me how to get there?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 从这儿一直往前走，到了前面的路口再往右走。
lines.pinyin: Cóng zhèr yīzhí wǎng qián zǒu, dàole qiánmiàn de lùkǒu zài wǎng yòu zǒu.
lines.english: Walk straight ahead from here and turn right at the first crossing.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 明天天气怎么样？
lines.pinyin: Míngtiān tiānqì zěnmeyàng?
lines.english: How will the weather be tomorrow?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 虽然是晴天，但是很冷。
lines.pinyin: Suīrán shì qíngtiān, dànshì hěn lěng.
lines.english: It will be fine, but cold.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 那还能去跑步吗？
lines.pinyin: Nà hái néng qù pǎobù ma?
lines.english: In that case, is it OK to go jogging?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 可以，但是你自己去吧，我还有很多事情要做。
lines.pinyin: Kěyǐ, dànshì nǐ zìjǐ qù ba, wǒ hái yǒu hěn duō shìqing yào zuò.
lines.english: I think so. But I'm afraid you have to go by yourself because I have a lot of work to do.

title: 你在这个商店买过东西吗

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你在这个商店买过东西吗？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zài zhège shāngdiàn mǎiguò dōngxi ma?
lines.english: Have you ever bought anything in this store?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 买过一次，这儿的东西还可以，就是不便宜。
lines.pinyin: Mǎiguò yí cì, zhèr de dōngxi hái kěyǐ, jiùshì bù piányi.
lines.english: Yes, once. Things here are pretty good, not cheap though.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我喜欢这件衣服，但是觉得有点儿贵。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuan zhè jiàn yīfu, dànshì juéde yǒudiǎnr guì.
lines.english: I like this garment, but I think it's a little expensive.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 两百块还可以，喜欢就买吧。
lines.pinyin: Liǎng bǎi kuài hái kěyǐ, xǐhuan jiù mǎi ba.
lines.english: Two hundred yuan is not that expensive. If you like it, just buy it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 今天是十二月二十号，新年就要到了。
lines.pinyin: Jīntiān shì shí'èr yuè èrshí hào, xīnnián jiù yào dào le.
lines.english: Today is December 20th. The New Year is approaching.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 新年你准备做什么？
lines.pinyin: Xīnnián nǐ zhǔnbèi zuò shénme?
lines.english: What plans do you have for the New Year?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我想去北京旅游，北京很不错，我去过一次。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng qù Běijīng lǚyóu, Běijīng hěn búcuò, wǒ qùguo yí cì.
lines.english: I want to take a trip to Beijing. Beijing is a nice place. I've been there once.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 你买票了吗？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ mǎi piào le ma?
lines.english: Have you bought the ticket?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 还没有呢，明天就去火车站买票。
lines.pinyin: Hái méiyǒu ne, míngtiān jiù qù huǒchēzhàn mǎi piào.
lines.english: Not yet. I'll go to the railway station to buy it tomorrow.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 时间过得真快，新的一年快到了！
lines.pinyin: Shíjiān guò de zhēn kuài, xīn de yì nián kuài yào dào le!
lines.english: How time flies! The New Year is approaching!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是啊，谢谢大家这一年对我的帮助！
lines.pinyin: Shì a, xièxie dàjiā zhè yì nián duì wǒ de bāngzhù!
lines.english: Yes. Thank you all for your help during the past year.

lines.speaker: C
lines.chinese: 希望我们的公司明年更好！
lines.pinyin: Xīwàng wǒmen de gōngsī míngnián gèng hǎo!
lines.english: I hope our company will become even better in the next year.
